name: Ginkgolides
summary: Ginkgolides are diterpene lactones in Ginkgo biloba extracts, especially relevant to platelet-activating factor antagonism.
description: Diterpene lactone fraction from Ginkgo biloba; ginkgolide B is a well-known PAF antagonist, but compound-specific human outcome data remain limited.
safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated for most users.
